terms.definition: A group of people born and living around the same time. Your grandparents, parents, and you belong to different generations.
terms.exampleUsage: Each generation has its own way of doing things.

terms.definition: People in your family who lived a long time ago, like your great-grandparents and their parents.
terms.exampleUsage: Our ancestors did not have electricity or telephones.

terms.definition: A way of sending short written messages over long distances using electric signals. It was used before telephones became common.
terms.exampleUsage: People used to send a telegram when they had urgent news to share.

terms.definition: A cart pulled by bullocks (male cattle) used for carrying people and goods. It was one of the main ways to travel and transport things in the past.
terms.exampleUsage: Grandfather told us how he used to ride a bullock cart to the nearby town.

terms.definition: A traditional clay stove used for cooking with firewood or cow dung cakes. Many villages in India still use chulhas.
terms.exampleUsage: Grandmother cooked rotis on a chulha using firewood.

terms.definition: A flat piece of dark stone that was used as a writing board in old schools. Children wrote on it with chalk and wiped it clean.
terms.exampleUsage: In the old days, students practised writing on a slate instead of a notebook.

terms.definition: Tools, machines, and methods invented by people to make life easier. Computers, phones, and cars are all examples of technology.
terms.exampleUsage: Technology has changed the way we learn, play, and communicate.

terms.definition: Customs, beliefs, and practices passed down from one generation to the next. Festivals and folk songs are examples of traditions.
terms.exampleUsage: The tradition of celebrating Diwali has been passed down for thousands of years.

terms.definition: The sharing of information or messages between people. It can be through speaking, writing, phone calls, or the internet.
terms.exampleUsage: Communication has become much faster with mobile phones and the internet.

terms.definition: The history, traditions, and values passed down from earlier generations that we value and want to preserve.
terms.exampleUsage: Old stories and recipes are part of our family heritage.
